violations.text: Milk was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit in the reach in cooler. The ambient temperature of the unit was observed to be 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, milk was left in the unit overnight. PIC voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The reach in cooler was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit to be taken out of service until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
